now.com體育】翼鋒禾確特在周六英超為愛華頓作地標戰，立即貢獻助攻，賽後領隊艾拿戴斯指隊友沒有為這名新兵提供足夠的供應。

周中以2000萬鎊離開效力多年的阿仙奴，禾確特（Theo Walcott）立即周六為愛華頓正選上陣，更在70分鐘以頭槌二傳予後備前鋒奧馬尼亞爾射成1:1完場。

這名28歲翼鋒今戰表現可人，以77次奔跑冠絕全場，而且在76分鐘轟出一記靚絕窩利，只是被門將賓科士打飛身撲出，未能在處子戰就打開入球之門。

艾拿戴斯表示：「他本可以憑那記美妙窩利建功。我們的球員深知禾確特希望控球在腳，卻未能作出應有的傳送。事實上，我們今天未能傳球予任何球員，一定要在這方面加強。」

大Sam又指，禾確特是一名極有天份的高速球員，要好好利用：「我們一定要以他的強項去比賽，將會努力向這個方向改善，下場鬥李斯特城亦會同時提升整體表現。」

圖片來源 : Twitter圖片

Robert Pires in extraordinarily frank interview with La Tercera.

Rubbishes claims Sanchez is a mercenary.

Says Sanchez wanted to stay at Arsenal and renew, but club wouldn't spend.

Suggests other players haven't backed up Sanchez and Ozil.

sportwitness.co.uk/robert-pires-a… #afc #mufc


Pires on Sanchez: “No, he is not a mercenary. Martin is my friend, but I don’t think you can say that. That’s football, and if City does not want Sanchez anymore, it’s their problem. And if United wants him and is willing to spend a lot of money, good for him."

"But for me, Alexis wanted to stay at Arsenal. I have not talked to him, but what I see, what I smell, is that he was very good in London, very good in Arsenal. What Alexis wanted was for Arsenal to spend money on other players.”

"There is a good connection between Sanchez and Ozil. But when they see that things are not right, they say “what are we going to do? We try to help, but nobody follows us.” It’s not a question of attitude, it’s that others must also follow. Both have won things.”

There's lots more, rarely see an interview so frank, well worth a read.

Worth noting he also said in October: “Ozil is a warrior who wants to win something. To me, he seems so angry about the fact that Arsenal hasn’t put together the team with which he can make a difference."
